variables.sans: --font-sans: "IBM Plex Sans", "IBM Plex Sans fallback", system-ui, sans-serif;
variables.serif: --font-serif: "Instrument Serif", "Instrument Serif fallback", serif, Georgia, Cambria, "Times New Roman", Times, serif;
variables.mono: --font-mono: "IBM Plex Mono", "IBM Plex Mono fallback", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace;
